task: Find the top posts from last year on 9GAG.
final_result_response:
The "Skills in PowerPoint" post has 28K upvotes and 374 comments. And the tenth post is: **"No meme. My 36yo pregnant wife had a stroke and died..."** - Random, 9 Apr 24, Cheered by +785.

I now have a comprehensive list of the top posts from last year on 9GAG. Let me compile and submit my results.

Here are the top posts from last year (2024-2025) on 9GAG, sorted by the "Last Year" filter under "Top":

1. **"THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE"** (Humor, 3 Sep 24) — 48K upvotes, 3.1K comments. A Dragon Ball Z meme about cancer winning.

2. **"Good job, mate"** (Superhero, 5 Mar 24) — 45K upvotes, 1K comments. A photo of impressive roofwork shared for the boys to appreciate.

3. **"Here is some money and luck"** (Wholesome, 17 Mar 24) — 47K upvotes, 381 comments. "Upvote money dog" meme.

4. **"Repost because it worked. I want you all to have good luck! Don't ignore!"** (Animals & Pets, 23 Nov 24) — 42K upvotes, 198 comments. Owl of infinite luck meme.

5. **"I'm sorry but it's true"** (Humor, 21 Oct 24) — 42K upvotes, 358 comments. Cowboy Patrick "you'll have a bad year" meme.

6. **"It has started...degenerates gathering"** (Memes, 9 Aug 24) — 34K upvotes, 1.8K comments. Photo of 9GAGers meeting up at the 3-border point.

7. **"I'm sorry but it's true"** (Humor, 25 Feb 25) — 33K upvotes, 262 comments. Another Cowboy Patrick repost.

8. **"Wife going to be operated for Brain tumour in 6 hrs, life changing night for me. Wish us luck!"** (WTF, 11 Aug 24) — 29K upvotes, 2.2K comments.

9. **"Skills in PowerPoint"** (Wholesome, 13 Oct 24) — 28K upvotes, 374 comments. A video showcasing impressive PowerPoint transition skills.

10. **"No meme. My 36yo pregnant wife had a stroke and died..."** (Random, 9 Apr 24) — A heartfelt post about loss, with 785+ cheers.

The #1 top post from last year was **"THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE"** with 48K upvotes, followed by **"Here is some money and luck"** at 47K upvotes and **"Good job, mate"** at 45K upvotes.
